dimensions.note: Read-side report; no credential/secret path. It imports the ScanError schema/interface from the shared twin only, never credential material.
No logging code changed by the regenerated twin.
No error-handling changes; the report reads stored scan_error rows tolerantly and does not reconstruct storage keys.
Report tests read stored scan_error rows by their attributes (kind, service, message, etc.), not by reconstructing scanErrorKey, so they are unaffected by the key-encoding change. All tests green.
Pure read/aggregate report with no writes or external side effects; unaffected by a key-encoding change to the producer twin.
Report makes no external HTTP/SDK calls; it aggregates stored model data.
No clients, handles, or files affected by the regenerated twin.

Only source change is the regenerated shared _lib/scan_error.ts twin (scanErrorKey encoding), which the report imports for the ScanError shape but does not call. No README/fixture identifiers added or changed. Manifest bumped to 2026.07.20.1.
